Defines a static array of bytes for FPGA boot configuration data.

# Purpose
This code is a C header file that contains a static constant array of type `uint8_t` named `s_boot_fpga`. The array holds a sequence of hexadecimal values, which likely represent binary data or a firmware image for an FPGA (Field-Programmable Gate Array). The `#pragma once` directive ensures the file is included only once in a single compilation, preventing duplicate definitions. The file includes the standard header `<stdint.h>` to define the `uint8_t` type, which is an unsigned 8-bit integer. The data in `s_boot_fpga` is a truncated version, indicating it is part of a larger dataset used for booting or configuring an FPGA device.
